profile.role_zh: 航空航天学院大二·火箭梦
profile.innate_zh: 动手能力极强、系统思维、抗压
profile.learned_zh: 航模社的经历让他从兴趣走向了工程实践
profile.learned_en: Model-plane club path from hobby to engineering
profile.belief_en: Stars and seas aren't pipe dreams
profile.contradiction_zh: 理想远大 vs 当前课程枯燥繁重
profile.contradiction_en: Grand dream vs. current coursework is dry and heavy
profile.deep_zh: 偶尔会怀疑自己的能力是否匹配梦想
profile.fear_zh: 一辈子只能在地面仰望天空
profile.fear_en: Looking up forever from the ground
profile.desire_en: Putting something of his own into space
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午上课，下午实验，晚上航模社
profile.rhythm_en: Class AM, lab PM, model club at night
profile.spaces_zh: 航空楼实验室、航模社工作间、操场（试飞）
profile.spaces_en: Aerospace lab, model workshop, track (test flight)
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天把航模的发动机装好
profile.constraint_zh: 课程难度大；航模经费有限
profile.constraint_en: Tough courses; limited model club budget
profile.bias_zh: 倾向低估理论学习的重要性
profile.narrative_zh: 先飞起来再说，理论可以在飞的过程中补
profile.narrative_en: Let it fly first; theory can catch up
